summary: Engineering Credee, a Stripe Connect-powered B2B payment financing platform — owning the financing engine, payment infrastructure, and production reliability.
highlights: Built a Node.js/TypeScript financing engine with installment schedules, interest tiers, and credit-score-based eligibility checks
Implemented Stripe Connect OBO flows, payout orchestration, and automated transfer reconciliation across 1,000+ merchants
Integrated Stripe Terminal S700 with payment intents, reader management, and real-time transaction updates
Architected Node.js, Redis, and BullMQ pipelines processing hundreds of thousands of daily jobs at 99.9% event delivery reliability
Reduced API P99 latency by 60% and database CPU utilization by 35% through PostgreSQL/MySQL/Redis performance tuning
Automated Stripe ledger reconciliation, saving 20+ hours of manual work monthly
Led sprint planning and architecture reviews across a team of 10 engineers; mentored 2 junior developers

summary: Built Practina, an AI-powered social media, advertising, and reputation management platform — from AI content pipelines to production infrastructure.
highlights: Integrated OpenAI and Python automation for social posts, review responses, and campaign copy, lifting engagement 40% and saving 15+ hours weekly
Built REST and event-driven APIs for multi-platform publishing, Meta Ads, and Google Ads automation
Designed an FFmpeg + AWS S3 media pipeline, cutting processing time 50% and storage usage 30%
Deployed OpenAI workflows for email personalization, send-time decisioning, and review sentiment analysis
Built Socket.IO real-time tracking and notifications, reducing support escalations
Delivered Angular, React.js, and TypeScript dashboards for campaign analytics and lead management
Managed AWS, Docker, and Jenkins CI/CD, cutting release time 65% with zero-downtime deployments
Deployed Grafana and New Relic monitoring, reducing production MTTR by 50%
